review_text: I had to redo this review because after playing it for as long as I have (at the time of posting) I can say this game wants me to hate it. For starts I love Darksiders, I love Darksiders 2, I actually played it halfway through on 360 so many years ago before stopping (cant remember why) and decided hey why not get it for like 3 bucks on steam. Well the first major bug hit when I was forced to turn V-Sync on just to be able to climb vined walls. After that I had several cutscenes that would freeze, the game would randomly crash forcing me to rebeat certain bosses, and sometimes it would crash upon starting. I want to love it but it does everything in its power for me to not. Honestly if it had a chance at being updated I would change this to a yes but considering that this franchise is dead (RIP) dont bother.  EDIT: The PC Port is bad IMO not the game itself, grab this on console if you can.
